title: Author Index
description: Canonical author identity and affiliation registry. Single source of truth for author metadata. Generated by generate_author_index.py, updated by enrichment pipeline.

AuthorEntry.title: Author Entry
AuthorEntry.description: Canonical record for a single author.

id.description: Stable integer identifier. Assigned once, never reused or changed.

name.description: Full name in DBLP format. Includes disambiguation suffix when present (e.g., 'Haibo Chen 0001'). Unique across all authors.

display_name.description: Human-readable name without DBLP disambiguation suffix.

affiliation.description: Normalized institution affiliation. Empty string if unknown.

affiliation_source.description: Which enrichment layer last set the affiliation.

affiliation_updated.description: ISO 8601 date when affiliation was last updated (e.g., '2026-04-05').

affiliation_history.description: Previous affiliations with dates, tracking institution moves.

source.description: Enrichment source that set this affiliation.

date.description: ISO 8601 date when this affiliation was recorded.
